scope.summary: Doctor reports IAM token source kind and explicitly marks source invocation as observed or not observed, instead of asserting a refresh happened.
out_of_scope: No live Oracle IAM token lane is claimed.
No driver-side invocation timestamp store was added; doctor reports last_successful_invocation=not_observed_by_doctor unless a caller supplies an explicit observation.

entry_points.name: legacy IAM token doctor checks
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core iam_token_check -- --nocapture passed: 6 passed, 0 failed.

entry_points.name: B16a/B16b token_exec counter proof
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test iam_token_source_physical token_exec_runs_once_per_physical_tcps_connect_attempt -- --nocapture passed: doctor reported source_kind=exec and last_successful_invocation=not_observed_by_doctor before the counter existed; two physical connect attempts advanced the counter to 1 and 2.

limitations: Scoped local tests only; no full-workspace clippy/test gate is claimed from this shared dirty checkout.
Doctor reports the configured source kind and observed/not-observed invocation status; it does not fetch or inspect the token value for refreshable source profiles.
